semantic.role: Infrastructure utility module for SQLite Write-Ahead Log (WAL) stale file detection and cleanup.
responsibilities: Defines a byte threshold (512KB) to identify stale WAL files that may indicate a killed process.
Exposes a recovery function that removes stale WAL and shared-memory (SHM) files to prevent empty reconciliations and subsequent LLM rate limit overload.
outOfScope: Database connection management or query execution.
Orchestration of reconciliation or sync tasks.
Any higher-level business logic or service coordination.
invariants: The STALE_WAL_THRESHOLD_BYTES constant must remain at 512KB to match the heuristic for detecting killed processes.
The recoverStaleWal function must only operate on WAL and SHM files derived from the given dbPath.
The module must not import or depend on service, task, or engine modules to comply with the infra-facade-imports rule.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, low-level infrastructure facade for detecting and cleaning up stale SQLite WAL files, preventing data loss and LLM rate limit issues.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected; the module appears stable and aligned with the pipeline fixes before v1.0.

English.role: Infrastructure utility module for SQLite Write-Ahead Log (WAL) stale file detection and cleanup.
responsibilities: Defines a byte threshold (512KB) to identify stale WAL files that may indicate a killed process.
Exposes a recovery function that removes stale WAL and shared-memory (SHM) files to prevent empty reconciliations and subsequent LLM rate limit overload.
outOfScope: Database connection management or query execution.
Orchestration of reconciliation or sync tasks.
Any higher-level business logic or service coordination.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于 SQLite 预写日志（WAL）过期文件检测与清理的基础设施工具模块。
responsibilities: 定义字节阈值（512KB），用于识别可能因进程被杀死而残留的过期 WAL 文件。
提供恢复函数，删除过期的 WAL 和共享内存（SHM）文件，防止空数据恢复导致后续 LLM 速率限制过载。
outOfScope: 数据库连接管理或查询执行。
协调或同步任务的编排。
任何更高级别的业务逻辑或服务协调。
